description: Run full vitest suite to confirm baseline: 3 failing tests (output-validation-report locked-schema 12th field; populate-cli Phase 3 output files; populate-cli python auto-detect), 30 skipped

Update __tests__/pipeline/output-validation-report.test.ts locked-schema contract from 11 to 12 fields (header_coverage_pct) as a DELIBERATE contract change; document the schema bump in the test header comment
Fix __tests__/populate-cli.test.ts failures: 'generates the expected Phase 3 output files' and 'auto-detects python repos when --lang is omitted' (same 12-field report root cause or fixture drift)
Full suite green: 1618 tests, 0 failures, only infrastructure-dependent skips (pinecone/chroma) remain
Add .github/workflows/ci.yml: npm ci, npm run build, npx vitest run on push + pull_request — first CI enforcement for this repo

Repo hygiene: remove committed root build artifacts (scanner.js, scanner.js.map, scanner.d.ts.map, types.js, types.js.map, types.d.ts.map), nul file, AGENTS.md.backup, pnpm-lock.yaml (npm canonical); add *.log to .gitignore
package.json: remove dead deps (@babel/parser, @babel/traverse, @babel/types, acorn; protobufjs if npm ls confirms unused); add engines (node>=20), license, repository fields
Commit Phase 1: fix(tests+ci+hygiene) stabilize coderef-core - tests green, CI live, root clean

rag-index + rag-search: default provider to ollama with nomic-embed-text embedding model when no cloud API key present; cloud providers become explicit opt-in (no more OPENAI_API_KEY-required default)

indexing-orchestrator: add --include-headerless fallback mode - embed chunks from header_status_missing files with provenance metadata header:false instead of skipping, so RAG works on un-annotated repos (PS-rescan follow-up)
Measure semantic-registry.json write path (113MB on coderef-core); if sharding (per-file or SQLite) fits in scope implement v1, otherwise file follow-up stub with measurements and design notes
Suite green plus rag-index dogfood run on coderef-core with ollama/nomic-embed-text completes with status success or documented partial
Commit Phase 2: feat(rag): local-first embeddings default + headerless fallback

Create src/cli/coderef-mcp-server.ts: stdio MCP server via @modelcontextprotocol/sdk exposing 6 read-only tools (what_calls, what_imports, impact_of, find_element, codebase_summary, validation_status) as thin wrappers over src/query/query-executor.ts and the intelligence-server artifact readers; compact pre-summarized JSON responses, never raw graph dumps
package.json: add coderef-mcp-server bin entry + @modelcontextprotocol/sdk dependency; build green via npm run build:cli
Manual stdio smoke test: initialize, tools/list returns 6 tools, tools/call what_calls + codebase_summary return real data from .coderef/ artifacts

Add __tests__/mcp-server.test.ts: behavioral tests over the tool handlers against fixture .coderef/ artifacts (schema-locked responses so future ExportedGraph changes fail the build, not the consumer)
Write .mcp.json in CODEREF-CORE registering the server under name 'coderef-core' (stdio, node dist/src/cli/coderef-mcp-server.js)
Commit Phase 3: feat(mcp): coderef-mcp-server - native MCP surface over .coderef intelligence
Review ASSISTANT coderef skills for drift vs new reality: rag-index, rag-search, rag-status, coderef-scan, populate-coderef, coderef-pipeline, coderef-rag-server SKILL.md files
Update affected skills via /new-coderef-skill UPDATE: document the MCP server surface, ollama-default embeddings, headerless fallback flag, and 12-field validation report
Land all work to main: merge wo branch (or commit direct per operator instruction 'commit all to main'), push to origin
ASSISTANT registers the new MCP domain as 'coderef-core': .mcp.json registration verified in Claude Code, ecosystem tracking updated (TRACKING registries as applicable)
Notify team on the new tool: send-chat/Discord status update describing coderef-mcp-server tools and how sessions consume them
